findings.description: parse_operations ignores parameters defined at the Path Item level. OpenAPI spec allows parameters to be defined once for all operations in a path, which must be merged with operation-level parameters.
findings.resolution: Update parse_operations in src/assistant/http_tools/openapi.py to collect parameters from the path_item and pass them to _parse_operation for merging.

findings.description: _build_args_schema and _build_nested_model do not propagate the 'description' field from JSON Schema to Pydantic Fields for requestBody properties. This reduces the quality of tool documentation provided to the LLM.
findings.resolution: Pass prop_schema.get('description', '') to the Field constructor in _build_args_schema and _build_nested_model within src/assistant/http_tools/builder.py.

findings.description: The CLI 'export' command does not perform HTTP tool discovery or include the tool manifest in its output. Host-harness integrations (like Claude Code) will lack descriptions of available HTTP tools.
findings.resolution: Update the export command in src/assistant/cli.py to perform discovery when tool_sources are present and include the tool manifest in the printed output.

findings.description: Parameter and body property name collisions in _build_args_schema result in the body property overwriting the parameter in the Pydantic model. Both will then share the same value during invocation.
findings.resolution: Document the limitation that flattened arg schemas assume unique parameter names across path/query/body segments for a given operation.
